headline: BTIG Maintains Buy, $275 Price Target on Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM)
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On March 17, BTIG maintained its Buy rating on the stock, with a share price target of $275.
